title: Grafana Dashboard Provisioning Reload and Schema Errors
dataSources: Grafana server log `grafana:log` with provisioning component tags
app: Universal Forwarder on Grafana nodes; `grafana.ini` log filters
spl:
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" component=provisioning OR logger=provisioning
| search "failed" OR "error" OR "invalid" OR "cannot parse"
| stats count, values(name) as dashboards by provisioner, path
| sort -count
description: Bad provisioning YAML stops dashboard delivery after Git sync or restart.
value: Prevents silent loss of operational dashboards during GitOps rotations.
implementation: Enable `filters = provisioning:debug` only when troubleshooting; default info suffices for errors.
